multiple_testing.interpretation: Each P3 survivor is one shot at beating the random-entry null MAX (~p=1/11 per shot). With this many shots a lone PASS-P4 can be search-luck; require a LARGE edge_over_null + forward paper-validation as a fleet challenger, NEVER an in-sample params flip (C4/OP-20, consolidate_elites caveat).
